calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-12-2014 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-28-2014 Continued To Nov-12-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mikael Koltai for Bo Andersson (Petitioner).

Mr. Koltai stated that the two Sons who filed disclaimers are adults, that he phoned each of the Decedent's Sons on October 25, 2014, that both Sons moved out when they were 21 years of age and were attending college, and that they continued to use the Father's address. Mr. Koltai also stated that both Sons are self supporting, that they are full time employed, that they informed him that this was their own decision with no influence from the Father, that they both read the petition and that he does not believe Susan was survived by any one degree relatives (siblings or parents). The Petition for Spousal Property was continued to November 12, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file something by November 6, 2014 stating that Susan is not survived by parents, brothers, sisters or any issue of brothers or sisters.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Continued To Oct-28-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
